title: freyera pumila
intro: Freyera pumila, also known as the dwarf freyera, is a small, evergreen plant native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Freyera pumila include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Freyera pumila can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
